summary.lv: Accenture meklē GenAI forward-deployed inženieri Rīgas birojam — lomu, kas vada GenAI transformācijas projektus klientiem, ieviešot GitHub Copilot un Claude kā noklusējuma rīkus visā SDLC. Prasa 5+ gadu pieredzi web izstrādē ar React/Node/Vue/Angular un 3+ gadu pieredzi komandu vadīšanā.
summary.en: Accenture is hiring a GenAI Forward Deployed Engineer in Riga to drive GenAI transformation for clients, embedding GitHub Copilot and Claude as default across the SDLC. Requires 5+ years of web development experience (React/Node/Vue/Angular) plus 3+ years leading teams.
